response.original_title: เกิด​ แก่​ เจ็บ​ *ยาย*
response.overview: The first-ever solo stand-up comedy show by Pompam (Niti Chaichitathorn). Marking his 44th year of life, Pompam takes the stage to share his personal timeline through his own voice. The show blends hilarious, bittersweet, and chaotic real-life experiences into a heartwarming comedy. It reflects on the truths of aging, showing how life's setbacks can turn into laughter, and celebrates finding perfect happiness in a simple, everyday life.
response.title: Pompam's Stand Up Comedy 1

cast.name: Niti Chaichitathorn
